# Motivation Labs

> Motivation Labs is a lean, AI-native software studio building tools for people who take their lives and work seriously — and for the AI agents that work alongside them.

## About

Motivation Labs LLC is based in San Francisco. We build software products at the intersection of human motivation, behavioral science, and AI-native infrastructure.

## Products

### Motivate Kids
- URL: /kids
- A behavior and mindset platform for parents and children ages 3–10. Turns daily chores into lessons on compounding effort and creative agency.
- Target users: Parents with children aged 3–10
- Status: Early access

### Motivate Me
- URL: /me
- Personal habit-formation powered by social accountability. Public commitments to a small circle of trusted friends dramatically increase follow-through.
- Target users: Individuals building personal habits
- Status: Available

### Motivation Pay
- URL: /pay
- Stablecoin payroll for AI teams. Instant USDT/USDC payments via a CEX-routed pipeline for globally distributed human-agent hybrid teams.
- Target users: AI-native companies, DAOs, distributed teams
- Status: Waitlist

### Motivation Team
- URL: /team
- Central hub for onboarding, SaaS management, and API key governance. The operational OS designed for lean human-agent hybrid teams.
- Target users: Engineering teams, AI-native organizations
- Status: Demo available

## Contact

- Website: https://motivationlabs.com
- Location: San Francisco, CA
